name: Spinach Fondue
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 oz Spinach, frozen, chopped - drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. At medium speed, blend the cream cheese and sour cream thoroughly.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and blend until smooth.
3. Refrigerate for 2-3 hours.
4. To serve, place the mixture in a casserole dish and heat through.
5. Serve with crusty French or Italian bread.
6. Serves 6-10 people.
